failure_modes.cause: Vapour pressure of solvent exceeds pump inlet pressure at T > 40°C
failure_modes.mitigation: Pressurise feed reservoir to 0.5 bar above vapour pressure

failure_modes.cause: Precipitation of reaction by-products at high temperatures
failure_modes.mitigation: Regular maintenance and cleaning of BPR valve
Ensure accurate temperature control and monitoring

single_points_of_failure: BPR valve — blockage stops all flow
validation_experiments: Run blank solvent at Q=0.5 mL/min for 60 min; monitor pressure for drift > 5%
Perform thermal stability test on solvent at 120°C for 24 hours; check for degradation products
Conduct flow test with BPR valve to simulate blockage and measure pressure response
